message:
test(core): property-based verification for flight recorder correctness (ft-oegrb.7.3)

7 proptest properties (1050 cases):
- deterministic IDs never collide across arbitrary pane/seq/ts
- merge-key sorted events always pass invariant checks
- replay determinism holds under arbitrary shuffle
- SequenceAssigner always produces valid replay orders
- deterministic ID generation is idempotent (same inputs → same output)
- merge key ordering is a total order (transitivity verified)
- serde roundtrip preserves merge key ordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
